close_reason: Persisted procurement source hierarchy and Orange County provider/source records; removed hard-coded catalog; fixed empty PlanetBids scans; BidNet disabled and discovery-only.
description: Build a systematic coverage inventory for nearby Southern California public agencies, starting with PlanetBids agency portal IDs such as City of Cypress 78736. Distinguish directly scannable free canonical portals from paid discovery-only directories such as BidNet/CaliforniaBids, identify missing agency IDs, and capture approved sources so Garden can iterate them reliably.

comments.text: Replaced hard-coded source catalog approach with persisted ProcurementSource hierarchy. Added parent_source/sub_sources relationship and parent+portal_id uniqueness; migrated dev DB; created disabled provider parents for PlanetBids, OpenGov, and BidNet; linked 29 OC PlanetBids and 8 OC OpenGov child sources; recorded Los Alamitos, Stanton, and Mission Viejo BidNet agency children as disabled discovery-only; disabled all BidNet children. Fixed PlanetBids valid-empty API responses so zero open bids is a successful scan. Added AGENTS.md hard rule that operational catalogs/IDs/keywords belong in DB. Removed unused hard-coded SourceCatalog and its seed script/tests. Focused tests: 7 passed; compile warnings-as-errors and ash.codegen --check passed. Broader procurement suite: 57/58 passed with one pre-existing SourceInspector login-form assertion failing in isolation.

title: Inventory nearby free procurement portals
